query: INSERT INTO users (email, name, role, password, loginMethod, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn, loginAttempts) VALUES ('admin@packgo.com', 'Admin', 'admin', '$2b$10$rQZ8K8Y8Y8Y8Y8Y8Y8Y8YOhashplaceholder', 'email', NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE role = 'admin';
